race.comment: Cracking edition of the Mahogany Final and SUNSPRITE (13) looks a great chance. She started favourite against DECALOGUE in Sydney and hit the line well for third. Fancy she gets a lovely run from the gate here and she should eat up 2500m now. KINGS REFLECTION (14) had no hope here behind DECALOGUE off a slow speed but got home very well. If he can settle closer from the gate he'll take holding out. SIMPLY GOLD (10) split DECALOGUE & SUNSPRITE last time so must have claims but the gate/map are tough. RAINSUN (3) is the progressive one who beat a subsequent winner last time at Cranbourne, fancy he'll stay strongly and has plenty of upside - keep safe.
